description: Visualization of AlphaFold pLDDT confidence scores for C6T1A2, highlighting zinc finger and EAR domains
code:
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

# Re-download and parse AlphaFold PDB for pLDDT
pdb_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-C6T1A2-F1-model_v6.pdb"
response = requests.get(pdb_url)
pdb_text = response.text

residue_plddt = {}
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        residue_plddt[resnum] = bfactor

positions = sorted(residue_plddt.keys())
plddt_values = [residue_plddt[p] for p in positions]

seq = "MTFIREDDDDQVDDDHDHDHVDGGGSQNSASNITEIVTTPEGENLGEWLSLGLKGDINMPAEEQNSSSRPLHSNNNKVFSCNFCMRKFYSSQALGGHQNAHKREREAARSYHQSHHHRIGFSYTTSLATRSLGIKPHSLVHRPNRERSAMVARFSSSDAINVGVGSVASSWTPFMLEQAVDFYWPGSFRGDLLPKQESSDVKKIDLDLRL"

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 5))

# Color by confidence
colors = []
for v in plddt_values:
    if v > 90:
        colors.append('#0053D6')   # Very high - dark blue
    elif v >= 70:
        colors.append('#65CBF3')   # High - light blue
    elif v >= 50:
        colors.append('#FFDB13')   # Low - yellow
    else:
        colors.append('#FF7D45')   # Very low - orange

ax.bar(positions, plddt_values, color=colors, width=1.0, edgecolor='none')

# Annotate domains
ax.axvspan(79, 106, alpha=0.15, color='green', label='C2H2 ZF domain (79-106)')
ax.axvspan(92, 97, alpha=0.25, color='red', label='QALGGH motif (92-97)')
ax.axvspan(206, 210, alpha=0.2, color='purple', label='EAR motif LDLRL (206-210)')
ax.axvspan(1, 31, alpha=0.1, color='gray', label='Disordered N-term (1-31)')

# Add threshold lines
ax.axhline(y=90, color='#0053D6', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5)
ax.axhline(y=70, color='#65CBF3', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5)
ax.axhline(y=50, color='#FFDB13', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5)

ax.set_xlabel('Residue Position', fontsize=12)
ax.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT Score', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('C6T1A2 AlphaFold Confidence (pLDDT) — Zinc Finger Domain Is Highly Confident', fontsize=13)
ax.set_xlim(0, 211)
ax.set_ylim(0, 100)

# Custom legend
legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#0053D6', label='Very high (>90)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#65CBF3', label='High (70-90)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FFDB13', label='Low (50-70)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#FF7D45', label='Very low (<50)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='green', alpha=0.3, label='C2H2 ZF domain'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='red', alpha=0.4, label='QALGGH motif'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='purple', alpha=0.3, label='EAR motif'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower left', fontsize=8, ncol=2)

# Add text annotations
ax.annotate('C2H2 Zinc Finger\n(pLDDT 91.5)', xy=(92, 96), fontsize=9, ha='center',
           fontweight='bold', color='darkgreen')
ax.annotate('QALGGH\n95.8', xy=(95, 88), fontsize=8, ha='center', color='darkred')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('c6t1a2_alphafold_plddt.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Plot saved successfully")
